Package index

General downloaders

Core functions for downloading files via multiple methods

downloader()
downloader wrapper
download_vcf()
Download a remote VCF file and its index file
load_rdata()
load_rdata

AWS

Download files from Amazon Web Services S3 buckets

aws()
AWS downloader

Figshare

List and download files from Figshare repositories

figshare_list()
List Figshare files
figshare_download()
Download Figshare files

Zenodo

List and upload files to Zenodo repositories

zenodo_list()
List Zenodo files
zenodo_upload()
Zenodo upload
